note: Known Cloudflare Workers under andromeda/04_SOFTWARE (and p31ca workers/). verify-worker-inventory walks andromeda/ but excludes */docs/files/* (Zenodo/attachment copies, not deployables). First `name` in each wrangler.toml is what the inventory indexes. Add entries as workers are promoted; P1 WARN for unlisted names is expected until filled.

workers.name: geodesic-room
workers.corsPolicy: none — WebSocket only, no CORS headers set
workers.authScheme: none — rooms are public by name; no PII stored
workers.notes: Durable Object holding K₄ tetrahedron vertex positions (4 vertices, float xyz). WebSocket broadcast room. Clients drag vertices; DO is authoritative state. Room IDs are user-supplied; no auth required for POC. P2: add CF Access or Bearer token for private rooms.

workers.name: p31-passkey
workers.corsPolicy: wildcard — intentional, protected by WebAuthn rpId binding
workers.notes: WebAuthn (POST /api/passkey/*); education GET; Node Zero (POST /api/hardware/challenge|pair|telemetry). Same D1/KV. ECDSA/RSA for WebAuthn. Hardware pairing is opaque subject_id + Ed25519 pubkey—no Passkey on device. Education/hardware fetch use high-entropy ids; static pages gate UX. P2: narrow CORS for non-WebAuthn paths.

workers.name: p31-node-zero-m2m
workers.corsPolicy: preflight OPTIONS for lab tools — POST is device/machine (Bearer), not cookie-sessions
workers.authScheme: Bearer M2M_BEARER_TOKEN (wrangler secret); optional insecure dev mode when DEV_ALLOW_INSECURE=1 and secret unset — never prod
workers.notes: POST /api/hardware/challenge emits six-digit pairing display_code + ephemeral KV record. Companion firmware: packages/node-zero/firmware/esp32-m2m-stub. Routes: uncomment zone route in wrangler.toml for p31ca.org/api/hardware/*. Replace KV id placeholder before deploy.

workers.name: k4-personal
workers.authScheme: none on mesh read; /agent/* is per-user DO
workers.notes: Personal K₄ mesh API + PersonalAgent SQLite DO. Deploy requires DO migration list in wrangler.toml. See k4-personal/README.md.

workers.name: k4-cage
workers.notes: Family cage mesh + topology DOs. unified-k4-cage reuses this worker name; same allowlist entry.

workers.name: k4-hubs
workers.notes: Life-context hub router; service-binds to k4-cage and k4-personal.

workers.name: p31-google-bridge
workers.corsPolicy: configurable CORS — credentials for /api/*; set CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN; no * in production
workers.authScheme: Google OAuth2 + session cookie; GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in wrangler secret
workers.notes: User OAuth: calendar.readonly + OIDC. Tokens in KV. Session cookie p31_gb_sid. Callback and success URL must be same site for Set-Cookie. See docs/integrations/GOOGLE-WORKSPACE.md + p31-google-bridge/README.md.

workers.name: bonding-relay
workers.notes: BONDING relay worker; allowlisted for inventory. Review CORS and bindings when changing.

workers.name: p31-bouncer
workers.notes: Bouncer / edge gate; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: command-center
workers.notes: Command-center worker; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-social-worker
workers.notes: Social-drop automation; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-social-broadcast
workers.corsPolicy: see wrangler (multi-name file — first name indexed)
workers.notes: p31ca social / mesh broadcast stack; first name in parent wrangler.toml. Review multi-worker file.

workers.name: donate-api
workers.notes: Donate / payments edge API; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: genesis-gate
workers.corsPolicy: see wrangler (wildcard CORS may WARN — triage in security:check)
workers.notes: Genesis-gate; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: kenosis-mesh
workers.corsPolicy: see wrangler (multi DO names in file — first name indexed)
workers.notes: Kenosis mesh worker; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-agent-hub
workers.notes: Edge agent / mesh chat; see worker README. Same allowlist covers internal variant name in file if second block.

workers.name: p31-cortex
workers.notes: Cortex / multi-agent; first name p31-cortex. Allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-forge
workers.notes: P31 forge worker; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-hearing-ops
workers.notes: Hearing-ops; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-state
workers.corsPolicy: see src — may use conditional * (inventory may WARN CORS)
workers.notes: P31 state worker; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31ca
workers.corsPolicy: static hub; passkey CORS in sub-worker
workers.notes: p31ca.org static hub wrangler; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-pwa
workers.notes: PWA / node-zero; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-quantum-edge
workers.notes: Quantum edge package; first name p31-quantum-edge; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-command-center
workers.notes: Sovereign command center; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: spaceship-relay
workers.notes: Spaceship Earth relay; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-telemetry
workers.notes: Telemetry; allowlisted for inventory.

workers.name: p31-workers
workers.corsPolicy: see wrangler (multi DO names; first p31-workers)
workers.notes: Love ledger / shared workers monorepo; allowlisted for inventory.
